rule_metadata.author: Markus Neis
rule_metadata.title: DNS TXT Answer with Possible Execution Strings

rules.rule_text:
title: DNS TXT Answer with Possible Execution Strings
id: 8ae51330-899c-4641-8125-e39f2e07da72
status: test
description: Detects strings used in command execution in DNS TXT Answer
references:
- https://twitter.com/stvemillertime/status/1024707932447854592
- https://github.com/samratashok/nishang/blob/414ee1104526d7057f9adaeee196d91ae447283e/Backdoors/DNS_TXT_Pwnage.ps1
author: Markus Neis
date: 2018-08-08
modified: 2021-11-27
tags:
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.t1071.004
logsource:
  category: dns
detection:
  selection:
    record_type: TXT
    answer|contains:
    - IEX
    - Invoke-Expression
    - cmd.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
